system.description: The squeaker within this bath toy foretells great possibility. Once per Mission, you may describe an outcome to this pocket-sized duck toy. The toy will speak back: the GM will tell you the 3 steps you must take to achieve that outcome. Any outcome you request becomes possible, no matter how improbable it seems. If you ask the Rubber Duck about Anomalies directly, it will melt into a useless lump instead.
